objective: Evolve local MPL-2.0 Graph Hub Core toward a public-safe FigOps product path without external publication or git side effects.
surface_summary: Graph Hub public-core working tree, FigOps evolution spec, release workflow, release checker, MCP surface, docs, examples, package metadata, and future figure reproducibility design.

assumptions.claim: The local working tree is being prepared as an MPL-2.0 public core.
FigOps is only a working name until legal and package-name clearance is complete.
assumptions.verification_step: Check that docs use working-title language and do not instruct package publication.

assumptions.claim: Publication remains gated separately from local readiness.
assumptions.verification_step: Confirm no push, PR, tag, release, registry upload, package publication, or visibility change was performed.

assumptions.claim: Figure-level manifest, bundle, replay, retarget, and plotted-data capture are roadmap capabilities unless backed by tests and implementation.
assumptions.verification_step: Check docs and release copy for future-tense language until tests and implementation exist.

safe_now: Keep FigOps as a working title only.
Record future design work without claiming unimplemented product capabilities.
human_gated: Choose final public name or publish under that name.
Create a public mirror, change repository visibility, push a public branch, or publish package/registry metadata.
Open a third-party plugin API or external code auto-loading contract.
Rewrite git history or run secret-history cleanup.

verification.falsifier: python -m json.tool on either plan exits nonzero.
verification.evidence_required: Successful json.tool output or zero exit status.

verification.claim_or_output: Planning artifacts do not introduce private marker blockers.
verification.falsifier: Private marker search or release checker reports a planning artifact as a blocker.
uv run python graphhub_mcp_server.py --smoke exits nonzero or reports non-ok status.
verification.evidence_required: Smoke output with health_status ok and tool_surface graphhub_mcp.

risk_gates.trigger: Publishing, packaging, or publicly branding the project as FigOps
Public mirror, visibility change, public branch, package, release, or registry publication
Stable third-party plugin API, external code auto-loading, or plugin compatibility guarantee
risk_gates.safe_default: Use project config, templates, and explicit scripts only

risk_gates.trigger: Rebase, reset, force-push, branch rewrite, or secret-history cleanup

expected_output: Future FigOps evolution backlog remains clearly separated from current local public-core readiness.
